name: Yext
heading: The #1 Yext Alternative
comparison:
• Unlike Yext, with Synup, you can request 5 star reviews and get feedback on your most important listings. Your review acquisition will be through the roof!
  • We boost your ROI with our free library of automations for managing listings, reviews, reporting, and scheduling updates, posts, and escalation workflows.
  • Synup Campaigns enables you to personalize your messaging on a granular level, so you target your audience with the right offer at scale.
  • Take control of your social media management, too, with Synup Social. With revolutionary AI-assisted ideas and content creation, managing your business’ social media has never been so effortless.
  • Yext updates are not permanent; you’ll lose your optimizations when you cancel. But if you decide to end your contract with us, Synup integrations won’t change back
text: Join the thousands of customers who chose Synup as a Yext alternative - including Fortune 500 companies! With a platform that offers more features at a competitive price, it’s no surprise that customers are happier after they make the switch!
